name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag in the brand's classic white Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
name_cn:

Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag in the brand's classic white Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4cm(D)
Color: Grey / Original leather.
Made in Italy
Model height: 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet, and lipstick
